transcript.message: Hello, it's wonderful to connect with you today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter with a growing fintech company. I came across your profile and was impressed with your experience in AI engineering, so I'm excited to learn more about your background. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

Hello Rohan, nice to connect with you as well. Currently, I'm working as a Backend Engineer at Mindtree, where I've been involved in various projects that leverage AI and machine learning technologies. Recently, I've been focusing on fine-tuning large language models and exploring their applications in speech recognition and natural language processing. My work has also involved using tools like Apache Beam and Milvus to build scalable data pipelines and efficient similarity search systems.

That's fascinating work, and it's great to hear about your hands-on experience with large language models and similarity search systems. I'm curious to know what motivated you to explore new opportunities, and what specifically drew your attention to this Senior AI Engineer role at our fintech company - what is it about this opportunity that interests you?

I'm open to exploring new opportunities where I can apply my skills in AI engineering to drive business value and innovation. Your company's focus on fintech and the potential to work on complex problems in this domain caught my attention, and I'm interested in learning more about the specific challenges and projects that the Senior AI Engineer role would entail. I'd like to understand how my skills in areas like NLP, speech recognition, and fine-tuning large language models could be leveraged to make a meaningful impact at your organization.

It's great that you're looking to apply your skills in a way that drives business value and innovation, and our fintech company is indeed tackling some complex problems in the AI engineering space. As we discuss this opportunity further, I'd like to get a sense of your expectations - what kind of compensation package are you looking for in your next role?

My salary expectation is ₹0L per annum, but I'd like to discuss the overall compensation package and how it aligns with the company's expectations and industry standards. I'm looking for a role that offers a fair and competitive compensation, considering my 6.9 years of experience as a senior backend engineer. Could you provide more insight into the company's approach to compensation and benefits for this Senior AI Engineer role?

I appreciate your transparency about your salary expectations, and we can definitely discuss the overall compensation package and how it aligns with industry standards. Before we dive deeper into that, I'd like to know about your current situation - what's your notice period like at Mindtree, and when would you be available to join our team if you were to move forward with this opportunity?

My notice period at Mindtree is 60 days, which is standard for our company. I'm committed to ensuring a smooth transition of my responsibilities and completing any outstanding tasks before joining a new role.

Now that we've discussed your notice period, I'd like to give you a better understanding of the team you'd be working with. Can you tell me a bit about what you're looking for in a team culture and what kind of work environment would make you thrive in this Senior AI Engineer role?

I'm looking for a team culture that values collaboration, open communication, and a willingness to learn and adapt. As a senior engineer, I believe it's essential to work with a team that is passionate about AI engineering and is committed to delivering high-quality solutions. I'd also appreciate a work environment that encourages experimentation, innovation, and continuous improvement, allowing me to grow professionally and contribute to the company's success.

Thank you so much for taking the time to speak with me today, it's been an absolute pleasure to learn more about your background and interests. I really appreciate your honesty and transparency throughout our conversation, and I'm excited to share more about our company culture and team dynamics with you. I'll be in touch within the next few days to discuss next steps and answer any additional questions you may have. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your job search and look forward to connecting with you soon.

It was a pleasure speaking with you too, Rohan. I appreciate the time you took to understand my background and interests, and I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon about the next steps. Thank you for the kind wishes, and I wish you and your team all the best as well. Have a great day.
